content.full_text:
CITY OF MORGAN HILL
REDEVELOPMENT AGENCY

17555 PEAK AVENUE MORGAN HILL CALIFORNIA 95037

March 17, 1992                                    ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT DIVISION
                                                  408/779/7221
                                                  FAX 408/779/3117

Sheryl Hoff
Fair Political Practices Commission
428 "J" Street, Suite 610
Sacramento, CA  95814


Dear Ms. Hoff,

About a month ago, I called and asked about the need to have our
City of Morgan Hill Economic Development Commission members file
Conflict of Interest statements.  During our conversation you
requested we send information regarding the duties of Commission
Members and the effect their recommendations have on the City
Council so that you could make a determination as to the need for
filings.

To date, the City Council has never taken action on a Commission
recommendation; the Council has merely solicited the Commission's
advice on things such as the scope of work for an Economic Study,
for example.

Please find enclosed the City ordinance and amendments defining the
Commission's duties and responsibilities.  Also enclosed are
minutes from the Commission's 1991 meetings.  They have yet to meet
in 1992.

Could you please inform us in writing of your determination as to
whether or not our Economic Development Commission members need to
file Conflict of Interest statements?  If you need additional
information, please call me at (408) 776-7373.

Thank you for your time and consideration.

Sincerely,

[illegible]
Dave Norman
Project Manager

cc: Director of Economic Development
